steps.title: Look for fusion details
steps.content: The task asks how the bicycles are fused together, so the answer must mention the shared rear wheel and the opposite-facing arrangement.

steps.title: Exclude background-only choices
steps.content: A says the bicycles are fused but not how; B only counts the bicycles; D identifies the artist and medium. The statement about sharing the same rear wheel while facing opposite directions directly addresses the task. The answer is C.
